changes.reason: Squeeze_long is not the tail source, but it has clean VALID_0DTE performance with 10 trades, $721 PnL, no slow trades, and worst MAE only -208.25. Moving from 6.5 to the next grid value tests whether the profile is being capped too early without adding entry filters.
Current configured TP is 3.75 while squeeze trades show large MFE/target context. A 4.25 grid value modestly increases upside capture while staying below the aggressive 4.5 cap test.
Keep entry quality unchanged at the existing 0.04 grid floor so the run isolates squeeze exit expansion rather than mixing in entry starvation.

expected_effect: Should improve squeeze_long average PnL and net profit with minimal trade-count impact. Reject if larger targets increase exposure hours, reduce PnL/exposure, or cut fast winners; this is not expected to fix the -527 charm-pin MAE tail.
label: squeeze-upside-capture-check
rationale: Use batch_b_squeeze_long_take_profit as a contained, non-veto experiment. Broad 1DTE tightening, call-wall expansion, runtime exits, and charm-wall structure gates have hurt or gone flat. Squeeze_long is underexplored, profitable, and not tail-heavy, so a small TP expansion tests upside capture without over-filtering the leader.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: squeeze_long produced $721 over 10 VALID_0DTE trades, 187.16 PnL/exposure hour, no slow >=12h trades, worst MAE -208.25, and median MFE 77.78. Current dynamic TP max is 6.5 and configured TP is 3.75, so the profile may be harvesting continuation too tightly.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Squeeze Continuation Upside Capture
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Higher targets may lengthen holds or convert fast clean winners into slower exposure, lowering risk-adjusted score despite higher per-trade MFE potential.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE squeeze_long entries with confirmed squeeze/option context and enough ES-VWAP slope to support continuation.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: squeeze_long PnL and average PnL improve, total net profit stays >=98% of run_001, completed trades remain within 10%, and pnl_per_exposure_hour is flat or better.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: The current leader is a highly favorable long-only regime: 107 completed trades, $7125.8 net profit, 100% realized win rate, 0.4% drawdown, no slow >=12h trades, and 65 fast und...

new_strategy_ideas.name: Charm Pin High-Extension Recovery Classifier
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE from -527 toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL and >=95% protected fast charm-pin winners.

new_strategy_ideas.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Profile
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL remains >= current $1305, 1DTE average MAE improves versus -123.86, and total net profit remains >=98% of leader.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Dormant Pin-Avoid Tail Split
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Activated profile must produce positive standalone PnL, reduce combined charm/pin worst MAE, and keep total PnL >=98% of leader.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Pullback Deep-Heat Split
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Retain >=90% pullback_long PnL while improving pullback worst MAE from -403.2 and keeping PnL/exposure hour flat or better.
